No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education and equips students with digital and AI skills for humanities research, enhancing learning outcomes (Targets 4.3, 4.4).
evidence: strengthen students' ability to use digital technology and AI for humanities research
innovation services and digital technology application capabilities
強化學生在數位時代運用數位科技與AI進行人文研究的能力

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course promotes innovation and technological upgrading through digital skills, supporting higher economic productivity and creativity in cultural/academic sectors (Targets 8.2, 8.3).
evidence: innovation services and digital technology application capabilities
strengthen students' ability to use digital technology and AI for humanities research
創新服務與數位科技應用能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly focuses on enhancing scientific research and technological capabilities by applying digital technology and AI to humanities (Target 9.5).
evidence: explore how digital technology and generative AI affect and enrich humanities research
strengthen students' ability to use digital technology and AI for humanities research
數位科技與生成式AI如何影響並豐富人文領域研究

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course directly addresses Target 11.4 by focusing on digital preservation of cultural heritage, including artifacts and archives.
evidence: digital preservation of physical artifacts, humanities archives
digitization process of physical cultural resources
實體文物、珍本檔案在文化保存上

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to responsible consumption or production.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course enhances public access to information through teaching digital resource retrieval and library database usage (Target 16.10).
evidence: quickly and accurately retrieve cultural resources on digital systems
familiar with the digital resources and databases of NCCU Library
以便於數位系統上以快速且精確的方式檢索到人文資源

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly promotes interdisciplinary cooperation and knowledge sharing between humanities and digital fields (Target 17.6).
evidence: Promote cooperation between humanities and digital fields
students will be able to integrate knowledge from digital technology and humanities
